message:
chore(gitignore): ignore ephemeral agent/test artifacts

- /artifacts/: top-level bead execution + placeholder remediation work products
- **/__pycache__/: Python bytecode cache from e2e test runs
- tests/e2e/output/: timestamped e2e test JSON results and watch logs
- .beads/recovery_*/: beads DB recovery snapshots (33-34MB binary dumps)
- .claude/*.lock: Claude Code runtime lock files (scheduled_tasks.lock etc.)

All are agent/runtime-generated, never forward progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -174,6 +174,19 @@ tmp_re_test/
 
 # Beads recovery directories
 .beads/.br_recovery/
+.beads/recovery_*/
+
+# Top-level artifacts directory (agent work products, bead artifacts)
+/artifacts/
+
+# Python bytecode cache
+**/__pycache__/
+
+# E2E test output directory (timestamped JSON results, watch logs)
+tests/e2e/output/
+
+# Claude Code runtime lock files
+.claude/*.lock
 
 # Clippy analysis output (all variants)
 clippy_*.json
